name: Bewitching Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Using an electric mixer, cream together shortening, butter and brown sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs, orange peel, orange juice, vanilla and buttermilk until well-combined. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda and salt in a separate bowl. Blend into butter mixture until combined. Stir in chocolate morsels. Drop batter by teaspoonfuls onto 2 greased baking sheets. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until brown around edges and bottoms. Yield: 6 dozen.
